body.title: Tool registry facia nodes
body.result: Seeded 187 facia nodes: TOOL_REGISTRY_ROOT (parented CP1) + INTERP_FACIA_<name> for all 186 registered tools. Enhanced narratives for run_bash, store_memory, patch_source_file, read_source_file, and 20+ other key tools. facia:true in metadata. Fixes shell vs run_bash class of error via spreading activation.
body.description: Seed facia INTERPRETIVE nodes for each registered tool — capability narrative + facia:true metadata. Tool registry IS the facia tree; spreading activation should surface run_bash when Igor thinks run-a-command. Fixes shell-vs-run_bash class of error.
